what_it_does: Stores frontmatter metadata for a channel attachment that points to a board item.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-d1bbbf9b.
It belongs to the dragnet-development channel.
The target is a board:// URI referencing item-7935e2f5.
An ISO 8601 added timestamp is present.
standouts: The target uses a board://item-7935e2f5 URI scheme.
The file is an empty attachment record with no payload or description.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter inside a Markdown file.
Attachment ids use an att- prefix.
References external entities with a custom board:// URI scheme.
concerns: No body content or context beyond the reference.
The referenced board item cannot be resolved from this file alone.
No author, editor, or modification timestamp is recorded.
notes: This is a bare attachment metadata stub linking a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-7935e2f5.
questions: What content or artifact is this attachment supposed to hold?
What is the title or nature of board item item-7935e2f5?
Why does the file have no body or payload?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a board_items attachment, and the file does exactly that, but only as a reference stub with no attached content.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped record that a board item attachment exists in a specific channel.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item from a channel attachment record.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped link between a channel attachment identifier and a board item identifier.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file in dragnet-development that references board item item-7935e2f5 via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To record the existence of a board item attachment and associate it with a specific board item and channel.
